sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_range (id UInt32, nums Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_range VALUES (1, range(5)), (2, range(1, 10, 2));
UPDATE test_range SET nums = range(3, 8) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, nums, arrayJoin(nums) AS num FROM test_range;
SELECT id, range(0, 5) AS generated_range FROM test_range;
